turns.name: WILLIAM REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinions of the Court in two cases will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON WHITE
turns.text: In 90-143, Connecticut against Doehr, we affirm the judgment of the Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit. The Chief Justice has filed a concurring opinion in which Justice Blackmun has joined. Justice Scalia has filed an opinion concurring in part and concurring in the judgment.
